hypothesis: On MP and OQMD candidate sets generated by CDVAE, GemsDiff, and DiffCSP, a surrogate stability score learned via ridge regression mapping CrystalNN fingerprints to static DFT energy-above-hull using 1,000 randomly sampled single-point calculations per model will reproduce SUN-based model rankings with Kendall’s tau ≥ 0.8 while reducing total DFT evaluations by at least 80%.
